decisions.question: Parser implementation strategy: rewrite parseEnvFile in-place to support Node-style syntax (quoted values, export prefix, CRLF, escape sequences), or introduce a new parseDotEnvExample function alongside the existing one?
decisions.chosen: Option B — new parseDotEnvExample function; leave parseEnvFile unchanged

decisions.question: Integration point, opt-out flag checking, and output routing: where in the pipeline does .env.example processing happen (first step inside ResolveEnvVars, pre-pass in Materialize, or new materializer step), where are opt-out flags checked, and how is stderr threaded through?
decisions.chosen: Option B — pre-pass in EnvMaterializer.Materialize; result in MaterializeContext fields; Stderr io.Writer on EnvMaterializer

decisions.question: Classification structure: should entropy + known-prefix detection for undeclared keys be an inline helper inside the integration point, or a standalone exported Classifier type with its own test coverage?
decisions.chosen: Option B — standalone unexported helper in internal/workspace/envclassify.go
